title: Neste Revises Downwards its 2024 Guidance for Renewable Products
content: Neste revises downwards its 2024 guidance for Renewable Products. Renewable Productsâ€™ sales prices have been negatively affected by a substantial decrease in diesel price during the third quarter. Finnish refiner Neste on Wednesday cut the outlook for its renewables business for the third time this year.
author: Analysts Account
